trace.code:
sparql_used = """PREFIX sio: <http://semanticscience.org/resource/>
SELECT ?formula WHERE {
  <http://rdf.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubchem/compound/CID2244> sio:SIO_000008 ?attr .
  ?attr a sio:CHEMINF_000335 ; sio:SIO_000300 ?formula .
} LIMIT 5"""

answer = "The molecular formula of aspirin (PubChem CID 2244) is C9H8O4."
sources = ["https://qlever.cs.uni-freiburg.de/api/pubchem", "http://rdf.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubchem/compound/CID2244"]

SUBMIT(answer, sparql_used, sources)

trace.code:
# Try with the known QID for University of Notre Dame (Q179510)
result = query_external_sparql(
    'https://qlever.cs.uni-freiburg.de/api/wikidata',
    '''PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd:  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema: <http://schema.org/>
SELECT ?label ?cityLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q179510 rdfs:label ?label ;
             wdt:P131 ?city .
  ?city rdfs:label ?cityLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = "en")
  FILTER(LANG(?cityLabel) = "en")
} LIMIT 5'''
)
print(result)
trace.output: {"head":{"vars":["label","cityLabel"]},"results":{"bindings":[]},"meta":{"query-time-ms":2,"result-size-total":0}}

trace.reasoning: The query with QID Q179510 returned empty. Let me try looking up the University of Notre Dame directly by label "University of Notre Dame" and also try using wdt:P276 (location) instead of wdt:P131 (located in administrative territorial entity).
trace.code:
# Try different property - P276 (location) or P131 with exact label match
result = query_external_sparql(
    'https://qlever.cs.uni-freiburg.de/api/wikidata',
    '''PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd:  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema: <http://schema.org/>
SELECT ?item ?label ?p ?cityLabel WHERE {
  ?item rdfs:label "University of Notre Dame"@en ;
        ?p ?city .
  ?city rdfs:label ?cityLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?cityLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(?p IN (wdt:P131, wdt:P276, wdt:P159))
} LIMIT 10'''
)
print(result)

trace.reasoning: The query results show that the University of Notre Dame (Q178848) is located in South Bend (and also Indiana, St. Joseph County, etc.). The city is South Bend. I have enough information to submit the answer.
trace.code:
sparql_used = '''PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd:  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX schema: <http://schema.org/>
SELECT ?item ?label ?p ?cityLabel WHERE {
  ?item rdfs:label "University of Notre Dame"@en ;
        ?p ?city .
  ?city rdfs:label ?cityLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?cityLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(?p IN (wdt:P131, wdt:P276, wdt:P159))
} LIMIT 10'''

    answer="The University of Notre Dame is located in South Bend, Indiana, according to Wikidata.",
    sparql_used=sparql_used,

)

- City: Notre Dame, State: IN (Indiana, USA)

This is clearly the University of Notre Dame in Indiana. Let me compile the final answer.
trace.code:
answer = (
    "The University of Notre Dame is found in OpenStreetMap data as a relation with the following details:\n"
    "- OSM URI: https://www.openstreetmap.org/relation/16066037\n"
    "- Name: University of Notre Dame du Lac\n"
    "- Amenity: university\n"
    "- City: Notre Dame, State: IN (Indiana, USA)\n\n"
    "The SPARQL query used the QLever OpenStreetMap endpoint to find all OSM features with "
    "amenity=university and a name containing 'notre dame', then identified the relation for the "
    "University of Notre Dame du Lac located in Notre Dame, Indiana."
)

sparql_used = """PREFIX osmkey: <https://www.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:>
SELECT ?place ?name ?amenity WHERE {
  ?place osmkey:name ?name ;
         osmkey:amenity ?amenity .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?name), "notre dame"))
  FILTER(?amenity = "university")
} LIMIT 10"""

sources = [
    "https://www.openstreetmap.org/relation/16066037",
    "https://qlever.cs.uni-freiburg.de/api/osm-planet"
]

SUBMIT(answer, sparql_used, sources)
